assertions.description: The CSSNestedDeclarations IDL interface is exposed.
A trailing bare declaration after a nested rule applies in its written source position rather than being hoisted before the nested rule.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const wrap=document.createElement('div');const span=document.createElement('span');span.textContent='x';wrap.appendChild(span);document.body.appendChild(wrap);const s=document.createElement('style');s.textContent='div { color: red; & span { color: green; } color: blue; }';document.head.appendChild(s);const c=getComputedStyle(wrap).color;s.remove();wrap.remove();return c==='rgb(0, 0, 255)';}catch(err){return false;}})()

assertions.description: Serialising a stylesheet with bare declarations after a nested rule preserves source order in cssText.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{const s=document.createElement('style');s.textContent='.a{ color:red; &.b{color:blue;} background:white; }';document.head.appendChild(s);const txt=s.sheet.cssRules[0].cssText;s.remove();const i1=txt.indexOf('.b');const i2=txt.indexOf('background');return i1>-1 && i2>-1 && i2>i1;}catch(err){return false;}})()

assertions.description: CSSStyleSheet.insertRule lets a bare declaration block be inserted after a nested rule, materialising a CSSNestedDeclarations entry.
